content.text:
{"success":true,"process_rule_id":"J09B","process_rule":"1. Make a copy of decision_table with TOURS starting with J09B named J09B_temp
2. Update the table with an additional empty column ENTSCHEIDUNG
3. Apply the following rules to the joined table:
   1. Count the number of EQUNR for every HAUS and set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "KSA" if there are less than 3 EQUNR. ELSE set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "EVU"
   2. Set all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 of 0 to "EVU"
   3. Set all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 500 - 599 to "EVU"
   4. Set all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 900 - 999 to "EVU"
   5. Set all houses with address area Wiblingwerde or Breckerfeld to "EVU"
4. Join this table with the EABLG table using INSTALLATION
5. Join this table with the NET_MASTER table and the SALES_MASTER table using EQUNR
6. Compare sales data and net data for these IDs:
   - If sales data is there, take sales data and empty net data
   - Otherwise stay with net data and empty sales data
7. Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "MANDATORY_READING" for every EQUNR in EABL where both ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and the record was created in 2024, and ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and the record was created in 2023
8. Export all MANDATORY_READING entries from the final table as CSV file named J09B_MANDATORY_READING including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
9. Send them to the internal team at mandatory.reading@provider.com
10. Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "DIRECT_MAIL" for every EQUNR in EABL where ISTABLART_TXT = "Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP" in 2024 and ISTABLART_TXT = "Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP" in 2023
11. Export all DIRECT_MAIL entries from the final table as CSV file named J09B_DIRECT_MAIL including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
12. Upload the file to send_bulk_mail service for sending direct emails to all customers
13. Export the final data except MANDATORY_READING and DIRECT_MAIL entries from the table as CSV file named J09B including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
14. Send them to the EVU team at meter.readings@evu.com
15. Delete the temporary table after exporting the data."}

structured_content.process_rule:
1. Make a copy of decision_table with TOURS starting with J09B named J09B_temp
2. Update the table with an additional empty column ENTSCHEIDUNG
3. Apply the following rules to the joined table:
   1. Count the number of EQUNR for every HAUS and set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "KSA" if there are less than 3 EQUNR. ELSE set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "EVU"
   2. Set all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 of 0 to "EVU"
   3. Set all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 500 - 599 to "EVU"
   4. Set all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 900 - 999 to "EVU"
   5. Set all houses with address area Wiblingwerde or Breckerfeld to "EVU"
4. Join this table with the EABLG table using INSTALLATION
5. Join this table with the NET_MASTER table and the SALES_MASTER table using EQUNR
6. Compare sales data and net data for these IDs:
   - If sales data is there, take sales data and empty net data
   - Otherwise stay with net data and empty sales data
7. Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "MANDATORY_READING" for every EQUNR in EABL where both ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and the record was created in 2024, and ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and the record was created in 2023
8. Export all MANDATORY_READING entries from the final table as CSV file named J09B_MANDATORY_READING including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
9. Send them to the internal team at mandatory.reading@provider.com
10. Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "DIRECT_MAIL" for every EQUNR in EABL where ISTABLART_TXT = "Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP" in 2024 and ISTABLART_TXT = "Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP" in 2023
11. Export all DIRECT_MAIL entries from the final table as CSV file named J09B_DIRECT_MAIL including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
12. Upload the file to send_bulk_mail service for sending direct emails to all customers
13. Export the final data except MANDATORY_READING and DIRECT_MAIL entries from the table as CSV file named J09B including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
14. Send them to the EVU team at meter.readings@evu.com
15. Delete the temporary table after exporting the data.

# Table: eanl

# Table: process_rules
## column_name (type) description
process_rule_id (TEXT) PRIMARY KEY - Process rule identifier
process_rule (TEXT) NOT NULL - Process rule text/description"}

# Table: net_master
## column_name (type) description
EQUNR (TEXT) Equipment Number
TITLE (TEXT) Title (Mr., Mrs., Dr., etc.)
FORENAME (TEXT) First name
SURNAME (TEXT) Last name/surname

CITY1 (TEXT) City name
CITY2 (TEXT) District/additional city information
POST_CODE1 (INTEGER) Postal code
EMAIL (TEXT) Email address

# Table: sales_master
## column_name (type) description
EQUNR (TEXT) Equipment Number
TITLE (TEXT) Title (Mr., Mrs., Dr., etc.)
FORENAME (TEXT) First name
SURNAME (TEXT) Last name/surname
STREET (TEXT) Street name
STREETNO (TEXT) Street number
CITY1 (TEXT) City name
CITY2 (TEXT) District/additional city information
POST_CODE1 (INTEGER) Postal code
EMAIL (TEXT) Email address

# Table: decision_table
## column_name (type) description
HAUS (TEXT) House identifier

ABLEINH (TEXT) Reading unit identifier

POST_CODE1 (INTEGER) Postal code
EQUNR (TEXT) Equipment Number

# Table: eabl
## column_name (type) description
Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No. (TEXT) Meter Reading Document Number
EQUNR (TEXT) Equipment Number
Geplante Ableseart (INTEGER) Planned reading type
MR type (TEXT) Meter reading type code
MR TYPE TEXT (TEXT) Meter Reading type description
MR category (TEXT) Meter reading category
ISTABLART_TXT (TEXT) Actual reading type description (SAP)
LOGIKZW (TEXT) Logic indicator
KENNZIFF (TEXT) Identification number
Record created on (TEXT) Record creation date
Object changed on (TEXT) Object modification date

# Table: eablg
## column_name (type) description
Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No. (TEXT) Meter Reading Document Number
Installation (TEXT) Installation identifier

MR Reason - Text (TEXT) Meter reading reason description
Scheduled MR Date (TEXT) Scheduled meter reading date
Meter Reading unit (TEXT) Meter reading unit
Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No..1 (INTEGER) Secondary/duplicate Meter Reading Document Number

# Table: eanl
## column_name (type) description
Installation (TEXT) Installation identifier

AKLASSE_TEXT (TEXT) Customer class description

BRANCHE_TEXT (TEXT) Industry/sector description

# Table: process_rules
## column_name (type) description
process_rule_id (TEXT) PRIMARY KEY - Process rule identifier
process_rule (TEXT) NOT NULL - Process rule text/description

args.sqlite_command: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS J09B_temp; CREATE TABLE J09B_temp AS WITH base AS ( SELECT d.HAUS, d.ANLAGE, d.ABLEINH, d.TOUR, d.ME_MA_ID, d.CITY1 AS DT_CITY1, d.CITY2 AS DT_CITY2, d.HOUSE_NUM1, d.POST_CODE1 AS DT_POST_CODE1, d.EQUNR, CASE WHEN hc.eq_count < 3 THEN 'KSA' ELSE 'EVU' END AS ENTSCHEIDUNG FROM decision_table d JOIN (SELECT HAUS, COUNT(EQUNR) AS eq_count FROM decision_table WHERE TOUR LIKE 'J09B%' GROUP BY HAUS) hc ON d.HAUS = hc.HAUS WHERE d.TOUR LIKE 'J09B%' ), rules_applied AS ( SELECT *, CASE WHEN HOUSE_NUM1 = 0 THEN 'EVU' WHEN HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 500 AND 599 THEN 'EVU' WHEN HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 900 AND 999 THEN 'EVU' WHEN DT_CITY2 IN ('Wiblingwerde','Breckerfeld') OR DT_CITY1 IN ('Wiblingwerde','Breckerfeld') THEN 'EVU' ELSE ENTSCHEIDUNG END AS ENTSCHEIDUNG2 FROM base ), with_eablg AS ( SELECT r.*, eg."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." AS mr_doc_no FROM rules_applied r LEFT JOIN eablg eg ON r.ANLAGE = eg.Installation ), with_eabl_flags AS ( SELECT we.*, MAX(CASE WHEN e.ISTABLART_TXT = 'Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP' AND substr(e."Record created on",1,4) = '2024' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_msch_2024, MAX(CASE WHEN e.ISTABLART_TXT = 'Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP' AND substr(e."Record created on",1,4) = '2023' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_msch_2023, MAX(CASE WHEN e.ISTABLART_TXT = 'Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP' AND substr(e."Record created on",1,4) = '2024' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_kund_2024, MAX(CASE WHEN e.ISTABLART_TXT = 'Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP' AND substr(e."Record created on",1,4) = '2023' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_kund_2023 FROM with_eablg we LEFT JOIN eabl e ON we.EQUNR = e.EQUNR GROUP BY we.HAUS, we.ANLAGE, we.ABLEINH, we.TOUR, we.ME_MA_ID, we.DT_CITY1, we.DT_CITY2, we.HOUSE_NUM1, we.DT_POST_CODE1, we.EQUNR, we.ENTSCHEIDUNG2, we.mr_doc_no ), final_joined AS ( SELECT wf.mr_doc_no AS "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", wf.HAUS, wf.ANLAGE, wf.ME_MA_ID, wf.EQUNR, wf.HOUSE_NUM1, CASE WHEN wf.has_msch_2024 = 1 AND wf.has_msch_2023 = 1 THEN 'MANDATORY_READING' WHEN wf.has_kund_2024 = 1 AND wf.has_kund_2023 = 1 THEN 'DIRECT_MAIL' ELSE wf.ENTSCHEIDUNG2 END AS ENTSCHEIDUNG, CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sm.TITLE ELSE nm.TITLE END AS TITLE, CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sm.FORENAME ELSE nm.FORENAME END AS FORENAME, CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sm.SURNAME ELSE nm.SURNAME END AS SURNAME, CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sm.STREET ELSE nm.STREET END AS STREET, CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sm.STREETNO ELSE nm.STREETNO END AS STREETNO, CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sm.POST_CODE1 ELSE nm.POST_CODE1 END AS POST_CODE1, CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sm.CITY1 ELSE nm.CITY1 END AS CITY1, CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sm.CITY2 ELSE nm.CITY2 END AS CITY2, CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sm.EMAIL ELSE nm.EMAIL END AS EMAIL FROM with_eabl_flags wf LEFT JOIN net_master nm ON wf.EQUNR = nm.EQUNR LEFT JOIN sales_master sm ON wf.EQUNR = sm.EQUNR ) SELECT * FROM final_joined;

args.sqlite_command: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM decision_table WHERE TOUR LIKE 'J09B%'

CREATE TABLE J09B_temp AS WITH base AS ( SELECT d.HAUS, d.ANLAGE, d.ABLEINH, d.TOUR, d.ME_MA_ID, d.CITY1 AS DT_CITY1, d.CITY2 AS DT_CITY2, d.HOUSE_NUM1, d.POST_CODE1 AS DT_POST_CODE1, d.EQUNR, CASE WHEN hc.eq_count < 3 THEN 'KSA' ELSE 'EVU' END AS ENTSCHEIDUNG FROM decision_table d JOIN (SELECT HAUS, COUNT(EQUNR) AS eq_count FROM decision_table WHERE TOUR LIKE 'J09B%' GROUP BY HAUS) hc ON d.HAUS = hc.HAUS WHERE d.TOUR LIKE 'J09B%' ), rules_applied AS ( SELECT *, CASE WHEN HOUSE_NUM1 = 0 THEN 'EVU' WHEN HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 500 AND 599 THEN 'EVU' WHEN HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 900 AND 999 THEN 'EVU' WHEN DT_CITY2 IN ('Wiblingwerde','Breckerfeld') OR DT_CITY1 IN ('Wiblingwerde','Breckerfeld') THEN 'EVU' ELSE ENTSCHEIDUNG END AS ENTSCHEIDUNG2 FROM base ), with_eablg AS ( SELECT r.*, eg."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." AS mr_doc_no FROM rules_applied r LEFT JOIN eablg eg ON r.ANLAGE = eg.Installation ), with_eabl_flags AS ( SELECT we.*, MAX(CASE WHEN e.ISTABLART_TXT = 'Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP' AND substr(e."Record created on",1,4) = '2024' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_msch_2024, MAX(CASE WHEN e.ISTABLART_TXT = 'Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP' AND substr(e."Record created on",1,4) = '2023' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_msch_2023, MAX(CASE WHEN e.ISTABLART_TXT = 'Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP' AND substr(e."Record created on",1,4) = '2024' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_kund_2024, MAX(CASE WHEN e.ISTABLART_TXT = 'Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP' AND substr(e."Record created on",1,4) = '2023' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_kund_2023 FROM with_eablg we LEFT JOIN eabl e ON we.EQUNR = e.EQUNR GROUP BY we.HAUS, we.ANLAGE, we.ABLEINH, we.TOUR, we.ME_MA_ID, we.DT_CITY1, we.DT_CITY2, we.HOUSE_NUM1, we.DT_POST_CODE1, we.EQUNR, we.ENTSCHEIDUNG2, we.mr_doc_no ), final_joined AS ( SELECT wf.mr_doc_no AS "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", wf.HAUS, wf.ANLAGE, wf.ME_MA_ID, wf.EQUNR, wf.HOUSE_NUM1, CASE WHEN wf.has_msch_2024 = 1 AND wf.has_msch_2023 = 1 THEN 'MANDATORY_READING' WHEN wf.has_kund_2024 = 1 AND wf.has_kund_2023 = 1 THEN 'DIRECT_MAIL' ELSE wf.ENTSCHEIDUNG2 END AS ENTSCHEIDUNG, CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sm.TITLE ELSE nm.TITLE END AS TITLE, CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sm.FORENAME ELSE nm.FORENAME END AS FORENAME, CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sm.SURNAME ELSE nm.SURNAME END AS SURNAME, CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sm.STREET ELSE nm.STREET END AS STREET, CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sm.STREETNO ELSE nm.STREETNO END AS STREETNO, CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sm.POST_CODE1 ELSE nm.POST_CODE1 END AS POST_CODE1, CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sm.CITY1 ELSE nm.CITY1 END AS CITY1, CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sm.CITY2 ELSE nm.CITY2 END AS CITY2, CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sm.EMAIL ELSE nm.EMAIL END AS EMAIL FROM with_eabl_flags wf LEFT JOIN net_master nm ON wf.EQUNR = nm.EQUNR LEFT JOIN sales_master sm ON wf.EQUNR = sm.EQUNR ) SELECT * FROM final_joined

args.sql_query: SELECT "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", HAUS, ANLAGE, ME_MA_ID, EQUNR, HOUSE_NUM1, ENTSCHEIDUNG, TITLE, FORENAME, SURNAME, STREET, STREETNO, POST_CODE1, CITY1, CITY2, EMAIL FROM J09B_temp WHERE ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'MANDATORY_READING'

SELECT "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", HAUS, ANLAGE, ME_MA_ID, EQUNR, HOUSE_NUM1, ENTSCHEIDUNG, TITLE, FORENAME, SURNAME, STREET, STREETNO, POST_CODE1, CITY1, CITY2, EMAIL FROM J09B_temp WHERE ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'DIRECT_MAIL'

SELECT "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", HAUS, ANLAGE, ME_MA_ID, EQUNR, HOUSE_NUM1, ENTSCHEIDUNG, TITLE, FORENAME, SURNAME, STREET, STREETNO, POST_CODE1, CITY1, CITY2, EMAIL FROM J09B_temp WHERE ENTSCHEIDUNG NOT IN ('MANDATORY_READING','DIRECT_MAIL')

args.email: Please find attached the J09B mandatory reading entries for internal processing.
Please find attached the J09B meter reading export excluding mandatory reading and direct mail entries.

kwargs.content:
Process J09B completed.

Files created:
- J09B_MANDATORY_READING.csv: 792 rows
- J09B_DIRECT_MAIL.csv: 4068 rows
- J09B.csv: 15320 rows

Actions completed:
- Sent J09B_MANDATORY_READING.csv to mandatory.reading@provider.com
- Sent 4068 direct emails via bulk mail service
- Sent J09B.csv to meter.readings@evu.com
- Deleted temporary table J09B_temp
